case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. MICHAEL MEMORACION et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR UNLAWFUL DETAINER JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MEMORACION, MICHAEL MEMORACION, JANICE LAWRENCE DOES 1-20 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $62.16 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEMORACION, MICHAEL MEMORACION, JANICE LAWRENCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1214 C GATEVIEW COURT, SF, TOGETHER W/ ALL ATTENDANT GARAGE, STORAGE & COMMON AREAS $4,368.30 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,368.30, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED "JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION"
